mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_checkin_items ( student_id, item_id, checkin_date, status, points, checkin_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.checkinDate}, #{item.status}, #{item.points}, #{item.checkinTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate}) ORDER BY item_id

SELECT dci.*, ci.item_name, ci.description as item_description, ci.points as item_points, ci.sort_order, ci.template_id, ci.checkin_start_time, ci.checkin_end_time, u.real_name as student_name FROM daily_checkin_items dci LEFT JOIN checkin_item ci ON dci.item_id = ci.id LEFT JOIN user u ON dci.student_id = u.id WHERE dci.student_id = #{studentId} AND dci.checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate}) ORDER BY ci.sort_order, dci.item_id
SELECT * FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate}) ORDER BY student_id, item_id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate})
DELETE FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND item_id = #{itemId} AND checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE daily_checkin_items SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE checkin_date < #{checkinDate} AND status = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE dci FROM daily_checkin_items dci INNER JOIN checkin_item ci ON dci.item_id = ci.id WHERE ci.template_id = #{templateId} AND dci.checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE daily_checkin_items dci1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT student_id, item_id FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE checkin_date = #{checkinDate} ) dci2 ON dci1.student_id = dci2.student_id AND dci1.item_id = dci2.item_id SET dci1.checkin_date = #{checkinDate}, dci1.status = 0, dci1.checkin_time = NULL, dci1.update_time = NOW() WHERE dci1.checkin_date != #{checkinDate} AND dci2.student_id IS NULL

UPDATE daily_checkin_items dci1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_id FROM daily_checkin_items WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND checkin_date = #{checkinDate} ) dci2 ON dci1.item_id = dci2.item_id SET dci1.checkin_date = #{checkinDate}, dci1.status = 0, dci1.checkin_time = NULL, dci1.update_time = NOW() WHERE dci1.student_id = #{studentId} AND dci1.checkin_date != #{checkinDate} AND dci2.item_id IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT dci.id, dci.student_id AS studentId, dci.item_id AS itemId, dci.checkin_date AS checkinDate, dci.status, dci.points, dci.checkin_time AS checkinTime, dci.create_time AS createTime, dci.update_time AS updateTime, u.real_name AS studentName, ct.template_name AS templateName, ci.item_name AS itemName, ci.description AS itemDescription, ci.checkin_start_time AS itemCheckinStartTime, ci.checkin_end_time AS itemCheckinEndTime FROM daily_checkin_items dci LEFT JOIN user u ON dci.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN checkin_item ci ON dci.item_id = ci.id LEFT JOIN checkin_template ct ON ci.template_id = ct.id
AND dci.checkin_date = DATE(#{checkinDate})
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%')
AND ct.template_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{templateName}, '%')
AND dci.status = #{status}
AND u.parent_id = #{parentId}
ORDER BY dci.checkin_date DESC, u.real_name ASC, ct.template_name ASC, ci.sort_order ASC
